description:
This quiz tests knowledge of AWS storage services including S3, DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS, and ElastiCache. It covers best practices and tricky gotchas at an intermediate to advanced difficulty level. The teaching tone is engaging and fun, using emojis and encouragement.
Topics: S3, DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS, ElastiCache, AWS storage services
Audience: Cloud practitioners, developers, and architects
